creator: omar.polo@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

Sorry, I forgot to update the status here. I'm using `USE_CABAL` from lang/ghc to build stack-1.5.1 directly from upstream, however ~25 dependencies aren't available and a couple needs to be updated, that's a lot of work. Is it really a bad thing to do `cabal install` in the makefile?

Anyway, I'm checking and porting the dependencies and when I'll manage to get stack compiling I'll start submitting new ports.

Regards,
Omar
